hero.title: The Escrow Backbone for Commerce in Congo.
hero.subtitle: Stop taking undue risk. Clairtus secures funds through regulated escrow wallets and unlocks payouts instantly via PIN—all on WhatsApp, zero friction.

features.title: An architecture engineered for uncompromising trust.
features.subtitle: Frontier infrastructure for real-world economies.

items.title: Bulletproof antifraud assurance
items.description: Buyer funds stay cryptographically held in licensed collection wallets until physical delivery is verified.

items.title: Instant liquidity
items.description: Binary validation—once the 4‑digit PIN is captured, our API settles to the merchant’s Mobile Money wallet in under three seconds.

items.title: Zero friction — WhatsApp native
items.description: No app installs. Clairtus is fully native to WhatsApp for instantaneous adoption across your network.

items.title: Human-led dispute resolution
items.description: If delivery sparks a dispute, the protocol freezes the escrow and our compliance cell takes over until a fair outcome.

programs.title: The Clairtus Protocol
programs.subtitle: An asynchronous transaction flow built for transparency and security.

items.title: 1. Initialization
items.description: The seller configures terms inside our WhatsApp automation. Buyers receive an encrypted provisioning link covering Airtel, Orange, and M‑Pesa.

items.title: 2. Escrow & PIN
items.description: Clairtus verifies funding and emits a buyer-only PIN. The seller can ship merchandise with indemnified certainty.

items.title: 3. Settlement
items.description: At delivery handoff the buyer transmits the PIN, the merchant submits it to the bot—the transaction settles and payouts release instantly.

cta.title: Upgrade to institutional-grade escrow.
cta.subtitle: Join professionals who already treat Clairtus as their transaction standard.

footer.description: Clairtus — Trust infrastructure for Africa’s informal economy.
